Email.Subject: Exploring Full-Stack Developer Opportunities
Email.TemplateBody:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I'm a Full-Stack Developer with 6 months of training at Infosys, where I gained hands-on experience in ASP.NET Core, Angular 14, C#, and SQL Server � building and shipping three end-to-end web applications.

I'm actively exploring new opportunities and believe my background in .NET and Angular development could be a strong fit for your team. I've attached my resume and would be glad to connect if there are any suitable openings.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Govind Sagar
+91 76520 34396 | linkedin.com/in/govind-sagar-53340a1b7 | github.com/GOVINSAGA
